name: senderos
description: Senderos de Chiapas — Next.js frontend + Strapi backend

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix senderos-de-chiapas && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix senderos-de-chiapas"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix senderos-de-chiapas
